ab: I sangsangdev nina remiad, a taluma’ ku sava tu vavainayan.
ch: 今天傍晚，弟弟就要回家了。
en: My younger brother is going home this evening.

ab: Tayra i iciva kaku aci vayi a micakay tu ayam, a micacak tu alesu’ay a sakalavi a pakaen tu vavainayan a sava.
ch: 我和奶奶去市場買雞，準備煮好吃的晚餐給弟弟。
en: My grandma and I went to the market to buy chickens and prepared a delicious dinner for my younger brother.

ab: Mitaeliv kami tu pacakayay tu dateng, adihay ku luengelay a dateng i nipatadaan.
ch: 我們經過了菜攤，他擺放了好多新鮮的青菜。
en: We passed the vegetable stand, which had a lot of fresh green vegetables.

ab: Sinicakay kami tu incay, kuletu atu nincing.
ch: 我們買了空心菜、山藥和胡蘿蔔。
en: We bought water spinach, yams and carrots.

ab: Ira i teparay a pacakayay tu lusay a tawki suwal saan : “U nipacakayan nu maku tu paringad atu rupas sicedamay yo! picakayi saw atudi!”
ch: 旁邊水果攤的老闆說:「我的鳳梨和桃子很甜。買一些吧!」
en: The owner of the nearby fruit stand said: “My pineapples and peaches are very sweet. Buy some!”

ab: Cakay satu kami tu paringad atu rupas.
Mitaeliv kami tu pacakayay tu titi, suwal sa kira tawki: A u maan saw ku cakayen nu misu? tataang siheci aca kina ayam anini, tulu a patekenan ku cacayay.
ch: 我們經過了肉攤，老闆說:「你要買什麼?今天的雞又大又肥，一隻300元。」
en: We passed the meat stall, and the boss said, “What do you want to buy? Today’s chickens are big and fat, and one is 300 NTD.”

ab: Matekesen ci vayi, keluli saw atudi saan a mipalita tira tawkian.
ch: 奶奶覺得太貴了，問老闆可不可以便宜一點。
en: Grandma thought it was too expensive and asked the boss if it could be cheaper.

ab: Caay tu katekes isaw saan kira tawki, awaay tu ku kakelulan.
ch: 但老闆說已經很便宜，不能再減了。
en: But the boss said that it is already very cheap and cannot be reduced any further.

ab: Katayni i takuwan a micakay tu vuting, saan kira i teparay a tawki, caay katekes, tataak aca ku vuting nu maku saan a semuwal.
ch: 隔壁的老闆說，來買我的魚，我的魚又大又便宜。
en: The boss next door said, come and buy my fish, my fish is big and cheap.

ab: Herek saan kami a micakay tu ayam atu vuting, taluma’ satu cacay a sapadan ku nipatada tu nicacakan tu sinavelan.
ch: 最後我們買了雞也買了魚，回家煮了一桌子的菜。
en: In the end we bought chicken and fish, and went home to cook a table of food.

ab: Matenes ku nipitala, araw tueman tu ku remiad.
en: After waiting for a long time, it was already dark.

ab: Patelay ku sava tu vavainayan, sikavahalan nu kuntay a caay aca pihivang saan, a pakucila tu lalipayan kiya a taluma’ isaw.
ch: 弟弟打電話回來說，軍隊突然不能放假了，要下一個禮拜日才回來。
en: The younger brother called back and said that the army suddenly couldn’t take a vacation and would not be back until the next Sunday.

ab: Suwal sa ci vayi adihay ku nicacakan, katien ku alumanay a patayni a kemaen.
ch: 奶奶說已經煮了這麼多，叫大家一起來吃吧!
en: Grandma said that she has cooked so much, so let’s eat together!

ab: Aluman ku nitakusan niyam tu cavay, kumuday nu mita a miseka tu nisakalavian.
ch: 我們邀請了親朋好友，一起來享用豐盛的晚餐。
en: We invited friends and family to have a great dinner together.
